category_sources: Official MaxMind/GitHub project describes geoipupdate as the GeoIP update client
source_facts.description says it automatically updates GeoIP2 and GeoIP Legacy databases
display_name_sources: Official MaxMind GitHub repository name is geoipupdate and describes GeoIP update client code
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents the geoipupdate program and points to configuration documentation
Official MaxMind Developer Portal provides GeoIP Update documentation
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/maxmind/geoipupdate, so repo is returned as null per instruction
tags_sources: Official GitHub README and MaxMind Developer Portal document the GeoIP Update command and configuration
